finance.title: Multi-Dimensional Behavioral Evaluation of Agentic Stock Prediction Systems Using LLM Judges with Closed-Loop Reinforcement Learning Feedback
finance.why_trending: First framework to systematically evaluate autonomous trading agents across multiple behavioral dimensions using LLM judges, addressing the black-box nature of aggregate performance metrics.

finance.title: SNAPO: Smooth Neural Adjoint Policy Optimization for Optimal Control via Differentiable Simulation
finance.why_trending: Scalable neural policy optimization framework that combines differentiable simulation with learned policies, enabling high-dimensional sequential decision problems in portfolio management and energy storage.

finance.title: Neural-Actuarial Longevity Forecasting: Anchoring LSTMs for Explainable Risk Management
finance.why_trending: Addresses fundamental failures of classical multi-population mortality models through LSTM-based hybrid approach with mean-bias correction, solving persistent unit-root problems in longevity risk.

finance.title: INEUS: Iterative Neural Solver for High-Dimensional PIDEs
finance.why_trending: Novel meshfree neural solver for partial integro-differential equations that efficiently handles nonlocal jump integrals, reducing computational burden for derivatives pricing in jump-diffusion models.

finance.title: A Geometry-Aware Residual Correction of Hagan's SABR Implied Volatility Formula
finance.why_trending: Hybrid methodology preserving analytical SABR structure while augmenting with geometry-aware ML features, representing a pragmatic alternative to full black-box neural replacements of established models.

social_sciences.title: Covariate Balancing and Riesz Regression Should Be Guided by the Neyman Orthogonal Score in Debiased Machine Learning
social_sciences.why_trending: Proposes that balancing functions in debiased machine learning should be derived from Neyman orthogonal scores rather than covariates alone, with implications for treatment effect heterogeneity estimation.

social_sciences.title: Cascading disruptions in natural gas, fertilizers, and crops drive structural food supply vulnerabilities globally
social_sciences.why_trending: Integrates bilateral trade in natural gas, fertilizers, and crops into cascading-impact model across 208 countries, revealing fundamental structural vulnerabilities in global food supply chains.

social_sciences.title: Causal State-Dependent Local Projections
social_sciences.why_trending: Establishes causal interpretation of state-dependent local projections under linearity condition, enabling valid impulse response analysis in heterogeneous-agent and macro-finance models.

social_sciences.title: Scaling the Queue: Reinforcement Learning for Equitable Call Classification Capacity in NYC Municipal Complaint Systems
social_sciences.why_trending: Applies equity-centered reinforcement learning to NYC municipal complaint system, addressing structural racial and income-based service quality disparities through algorithmic optimization.
topics: ML for Fairness and Social Good

social_sciences.title: Optimal Contextual Pricing under Agnostic Non-Lipschitz Demand
social_sciences.why_trending: Polynomial-time algorithm for contextual pricing under non-Lipschitz demand with arbitrary discontinuities, achieving optimal Õ(T^{2/3}) regret in a previously hard regime.
topics: Algorithmic Game Theory and Mechanism Design

topics.name: Deep Learning for Finance
topics.summary: Neural and deep learning methods applied to financial problems including derivatives pricing, longevity forecasting, volatility modeling, and rough volatility dynamics.

topics.name: Agentic AI in Finance
topics.summary: Multi-agent LLM systems and autonomous decision-making in trading and financial applications, with focus on coordination, behavioral evaluation, and failure mode analysis.

topics.name: Volatility and Option Pricing
topics.summary: Advanced methods for implied volatility extraction, option pricing approximations, and volatility surface modeling including caplet stripping and SABR corrections.

topics.name: Portfolio Optimization and Risk Management
topics.summary: Portfolio selection, asset allocation, and risk management under various constraints including lambda quantiles, volatility uncertainty, metric dependence screening, and ESG-as-insurance.

topics.name: Market Microstructure and Trading
topics.summary: Market making, basis trading, intraday signals, and informed trading in both traditional and decentralized markets including perpetual DEXs and prediction markets.

topics.name: Causal Inference and Debiased ML
topics.summary: Methodological advances in causal estimation under heterogeneity, including debiased machine learning, orthogonal scores, difference-in-differences, and panel data approaches.

topics.name: Econometric Methods and Statistical Inference
topics.summary: Advanced econometric techniques including GMM under misspecification, two-way heterogeneity inference, impulse response averaging, and Fourier-based statistical analysis.

topics.name: Systems, Networks and Complexity
topics.summary: Analysis of complex interconnected systems including supply chain cascades, distance matrix dynamics, and multivariate Hawkes processes with applications to systemic risk.

topics.name: ML for Fairness and Social Good
topics.summary: Machine learning and algorithmic methods addressing fairness, equity, and social welfare including municipal service allocation, pricing under constraints, and demographic analysis.

topics.name: Algorithmic Game Theory and Mechanism Design
topics.summary: Game-theoretic and mechanism design approaches to cooperation, fair division, lending, and collective decision-making, including LLM-based agent coordination.
